tasks.subject: Task 1: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Initialize Vite + React + TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS v4, Vitest.

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm test -- --run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["package.json", "vite.config.ts", "vitest.config.ts", "src/main.tsx", "src/App.tsx", "src/main.css", "src/config.ts", "public/manifest.json", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test -- --run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run dev starts", "npm run build succeeds", "Vitest runs clean", "Tailwind CSS working", "PWA manifest present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Core Types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define TypeScript types for all data models.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All core types defined", "Types compile"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Set Inference Engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Parse Sets column and expand to individual ExpandedSet objects.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/__tests__/setInference.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/workout/setInference.ts", "src/__tests__/setInference.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/__tests__/setInference.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Set expansion", "Fill-up behavior", "Superset detection", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Autofill Logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve reps/value from log history with routine config fallback.

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/__tests__/autofill.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/workout/autofill.ts", "src/__tests__/autofill.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/__tests__/autofill.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Log history priority", "Config fallback", "Null handling", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Google Auth + Token Management
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Google OAuth with persistent session via GIS.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/auth/googleAuth.ts", "src/auth/AuthProvider.tsx", "src/auth/useAuth.ts", "src/auth/LoginScreen.tsx", "index.html"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GIS script loaded", "Token persistence", "AuthProvider works", "Login screen renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Google Sheets & Drive API Services
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Read routines, read/append logs via Sheets API; list/create sheets via Drive API.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sheets/sheetsApi.ts", "src/sheets/driveApi.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Routine fetch", "Log fetch/append", "Sheet listing", "Sheet creation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: IndexedDB Cache Layer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dexie-based IndexedDB for caching routines, logs, workouts, preferences.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/data/db.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dexie database configured", "All CRUD functions exported", "Compiles clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Data Hooks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** React hooks bridging Sheets API, IndexedDB, and UI.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/data/useSheetContext.tsx", "src/data/useRoutines.ts", "src/data/useWorkout.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["SheetProvider works", "useRoutines hook", "useWorkout hook", "Workout persists in IndexedDB"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: App Shell + Bottom Navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** App shell with header, bottom nav, 3 tabs, sync indicator.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/icons.tsx", "src/ui/BottomNav.tsx", "src/ui/Layout.tsx", "src/ui/SyncIndicator.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["3 tabs render", "Active/inactive icons", "Dumbbell icon", "Tab switching", "Sync indicator"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Routines Tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Routines tab with program selector and routine cards.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/routines/ProgramSelector.tsx", "src/ui/routines/RoutineCard.tsx", "src/ui/routines/RoutinesTab.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Program selector", "Routine cards", "Workout start", "Discard confirmation"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Workout Tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Workout tab with collapsed/expanded views, checkboxes, supersets, finish flow.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/workout/SetRow.tsx", "src/ui/workout/ExerciseRow.tsx", "src/ui/workout/SupersetGroup.tsx", "src/ui/workout/WorkoutTab.tsx", "src/ui/workout/FinishWorkoutSheet.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Collapsed/expanded views", "Checkboxes", "Superset grouping", "Add Set", "Finish flow", "Discard"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Routine Update Prompt + Sheet Selector
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Post-workout routine update prompt and sheet selector screen.

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/workout/RoutineUpdatePrompt.tsx", "src/ui/SheetSelector.tsx", "src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Routine update prompt", "Sheet selector", "Sheet creation", "Full flow works"]}
```
